## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Business reason or bug fix context.

## How

Technical approach taken.

## Checklist

- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No auth/payment/data-deletion changes without explicit review
- [ ] No new environment variables without docs update
- [ ] Mobile tested (if UI change)
- [ ] Database migration tested (if schema change)
